message:
refactor(stats): Consolidate number formatting with formatStarCount helper

Removes duplicate number formatting logic by delegating to the
centralized formatStarCount utility:

lib/github-stats.ts:
- formatNumber() now simply calls formatStarCount()
- formatStarsDisplay() updated to use formatStarCount() directly
- Removes redundant NaN/invalid guards (handled in formatStarCount)
- Removes duplicate K/M suffix logic

scripts/update-stats.ts:
- Fixes regex patterns for stat value extraction
- Changes from greedy single-line match to non-greedy multiline
- Pattern: /(label:\s*"GitHub Stars",\s*value:\s*)"[^"]+"/ becomes
          /(label:\s*"GitHub Stars",[\s\S]*?value:\s*)"[^"]+"/
- This handles cases where label and value span multiple lines

The consolidation ensures consistent formatting behavior across the
codebase and reduces maintenance burden when formatting rules change.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
